name: Nanoscale RFID Dust
blurb: Microscopic wireless tags embedded in materials, tracking objects at the molecular level.

name: Supply Chain Provenance Tags
blurb: RFID chips on goods log environmental impact data from farm to consumer.

name: Metabolic Pause Implants
blurb: RFID-triggered implants induce controlled metabolic slowdown for medical stasis.

name: Gene-Tagged Organism Registry
blurb: RFID-like DNA barcodes identify organisms with CRISPR-encoded unique sequences.

name: Neural Activity RFID Logger
blurb: Passive implanted tags transmit real-time brainwave snapshots to nearby readers.

name: Planetary Biosphere Sensor Mesh
blurb: Billions of RFID nodes blanket a planet's surface to monitor terraforming progress.

name: AR Context Tag Layer
blurb: RFID tags on physical objects feed live metadata directly into augmented-reality overlays.

name: Stellar Infrastructure Beacon Grid
blurb: Passive RFID-class beacons track and inventory components across a Dyson-sphere megaproject.

name: Roadway Embedded Navigation Tags
blurb: Pavement-embedded RFID tiles give self-driving cars centimetre-precise lane positioning.

name: Superfluid Analog Neural Bus
blurb: Frictionless superfluid channels carry AI computation signals with zero thermal loss.

name: Lossless Quantum Fax Conduit
blurb: Superfluid-coupled channels transmit document data with no signal degradation whatsoever.

name: Zero-Friction MRI Coolant Loop
blurb: Superfluid helium cooling boosts MRI magnet stability and imaging resolution significantly.

name: Superfluid Qubit Isolation Bath
blurb: Superfluid environment suppresses decoherence, extending quantum computer qubit lifetime dramatically.

name: Frictionless Actuator Joints
blurb: Android joints filled with superfluid lubricant achieve near-silent, energy-free motion.

name: Superfluid Consensus Clock
blurb: A superfluid oscillator provides nanosecond-synchronized time references for blockchain nodes.

name: Cryogenic CT Contrast Medium
blurb: Superfluid tracer injected into tissue sharply enhances CT scan density contrast.

name: Superfluid Holographic Waveguide
blurb: Light guided through superfluid channels produces aberration-free holographic reconstructions.

name: Frictionless Neuro-Compliance Loop
blurb: Superfluid-coupled neural feedback sustains belief-altering stimulus without physiological resistance.

name: Cortical Nanoelectrode Array
blurb: Nanoscale electrodes distributed across the cortex capture single-neuron EEG at full resolution.

name: Molecular Road Condition Sensors
blurb: Nanosensors embedded in asphalt report ice, cracks, and debris to autonomous vehicles.

name: Intention-Responsive Limb Control
blurb: AI decodes residual nerve signals to drive prosthetic limbs with natural precision.

name: Fullerene Data Storage Arrays
blurb: Individual fullerene molecules serve as addressable memory cells in molecular computing.

name: Aerogel Thermal Server Jacket
blurb: Aerogel insulation wraps data centres, slashing cooling energy by retaining waste heat.

name: Biological Duplicate Android

blurb: Trace isotope signatures in bone and tissue serve as unforgeable biological identity markers.

name: Reactor Operations AR Overlay
blurb: Augmented-reality headsets show live neutron flux and coolant data projected onto reactor hardware.

name: Eco-Stress Neural Monitor
blurb: EEG readings correlate cognitive stress patterns with individual environmental consumption behaviour.

name: Ecological Route Optimisation

name: Haptic Document Relay Limb
blurb: Prosthetic hand receives fax-like tactile blueprints and reproduces physical textures on command.

name: Molecular Crypto Token Vault

name: Aerogel Cold Wallet Capsule

name: Orbital Tether Service Android

name: MRI-Guided Prosthetic Calibration
blurb: Real-time MRI maps residual muscle contractions to tune prosthetic limb response dynamically.

name: Graphene-Reinforced Aerogel Panels
blurb: Graphene fibres woven into aerogel yield insulating material with structural load-bearing strength.

name: Adaptive Biometric Spoofing Defence
